n: Instance: The Gates of Carn Dûm

steps.t: Protect Lorniel as she searches for her father, Golodir.
Protect Lorniel as she searches for her father, Golodir.
Protect Lorniel as she searches for her father, Golodir.
After you found Golodir, Lorniel was slain. Now the False King stands before you, far from his source of power. Now is the time to defeat Mordirith.
Golodir is waiting to talk to you. You have found Golodir and driven off Mordirith, but at a terrible cost.
